title: Amazon Redshift introduces AWS Graviton-based RG instances with an integrated data lake query engine
summary: Amazon Redshift RG instances, powered by AWS Graviton, run data warehouse and data lake workloads up to 2.4x as fast as RA3 instances at 30% lower price per vCPU. Its integrated data lake query engine supports open table formats such as Apache Iceberg.
author: Channy Yun (윤석찬)

title: Leading AI chatbots avoid harm but fall short in high-risk conversations, startup’s new benchmark finds
summary: Seattle-based mpathic released mPACT, a clinician-led benchmark that evaluates how leading AI models handle conversations involving suicide risk, eating disorders, and misinformation. Read More
author: Kurt Schlosser

title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
author: Carolyn Tiernan | MIT Open Learning

title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
author: Carolyn Tiernan | MIT Open Learning

title: Predictive Analysis Amazon
summary: Why it matters: See how Amazon uses predictive analytics to generate 35% of revenue, ship before you order, and optimize a million robots. Data, case studies, and AWS tools inside.
author: Sanksshep Mahendra

title: Claude Cowork setup: the only 2 files you need
summary:
Cowork Toolkit: https://coworkacademy.ai/toolkit?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shortform&utm_campaign=ig059

Your entire #ClaudeCowork setup starts with two plain text files.

CLAUDE.md is the instruction manual Cowork reads at the start of every session. Mine has a routing map that automatically loads my travel workstation when I start planning a trip, my email workstation when I'm drafting replies.

Every working mode gets its own instructions without me having to repeat anything.

MEMORY.md stores your active projects and key decisions between sessions. When I planned a trip to Taiwan, Cowork pulled up the specific visa application I needed because it remembered I had to fill one out last time.

Two files. That's the whole foundation.

Follow for more practical #AI tips.

#Claude
author: Jeff Su
